MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JAY P. RENNEISEN, ESQ., (925)280-8900, FOR PLAINTIFFS/MOVING PARTIES, CHAD M. CORDON, ALICE B. LEON, DENNIS POWERS, AND EDWIN ANDERSON
KEVIN K. CHOLAKIAN, ESQ.(LAW OFFICES OF CHOLAKIAN & ASSOCIATES), (650)871-9544, FOR DEFENDANTS/OPPOSING PARTIES, TRANS-METRO EXPRESS, INC., AND JOHN SAENZ, JR.

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS CHAD M. CORDON, ALICE B. LEON, EDWIN ANDERSON, AND DENNIS POWERS' Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT DID NOT FILE A TIMELY OPPOSITION ANY EVENT THE ALLEGED FACTS ARE SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT THE CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. THE TRUTH OF THOSE FACTS IS AN ISSUE FOR ANOTHER DAY. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358 (301/PJB)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
KEVIN K. CHOLAKIAN, ESQ.(LAW OFFICES OF CHOLAKIAN & ASSOCIATES), (650)871-9544, FOR DEFENDANTS/MOVING PARTIES, TRANS-METRO EXPRESS, INC., AND JOHN SAENZ, JR.
JAY P. RENNEISEN, ESQ., (925)280-8900, FOR PLAINTIFFS/OPPOSING PARTIES, CHAD M. CORDON, ALICE B. LEON, DENNIS POWERS, AND EDWIN ANDERSON

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS TRANS-METRO EXPRESS INC., AND JOHN SAENZ, JR.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 AND TREATED AS A MOTION TO STRIKE AND GRANTED AS TO PARAGRAPH 46. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS OTHERWISE DENIED BECAUSE THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT DEFENDANT'S STATUS AS A TRANSPORTATION COMPANY EXEMPTS IT FROM SECTION 15610.17. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358 (301/PJB)
